TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jason_Acuña, title = Jason_Acuña, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jason_Acuña} }

S.FORM: Jason Acuña kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 5, Jason Acuña, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jason Acuña kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 5, Jason Acuña, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *as~ɕon aʦ~ʨu*a kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *as~ɕon aʦ~ʨu*a, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
